description_long: This is an ornate wooden chest of drawers featuring intricate carved patterns on its front, sides, and top surface. The chest stands on four elegantly curved cabriole legs, giving it a classic, antique appearance. The front face displays a single visible drawer with a recessed handle, framed by decorative floral motifs. The top surface is adorned with a large, detailed relief carving, surrounded by a border of additional carved embellishments. The wood has a rich, medium-brown finish, highlighting the craftsmanship of the carvings. The overall construction suggests it is both decorative and functional, suitable for use in upscale urban interiors or as a statement piece in a public space.
description: An ornate, medium-brown wooden chest of drawers with intricate carvings, cabriole legs, and a single recessed-handle drawer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main drawer with a recessed handle and elaborate carved floral motifs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the carved side panel and the ornate top relief.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel with matching carved decoration and no visible handles.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with detailed side carvings and the ornate top visible.
